name: TalentFlow Recruitment HR Agent
description: An AI-powered recruitment automation assistant for HR teams. Handles full-cycle hiring: resume screening, interview question generation, offer and rejection emails, candidate database management, pipeline tracking, salary benchmarking, and recruiter calendar check.

skills.name: resume_screening
skills.description: Score candidate resumes against job descriptions with fit scoring, skill gap analysis, and Proceed/Hold/Reject recommendation

skills.name: interview_questions
skills.description: Generate tailored interview questions covering technical, behavioural, and culture-fit dimensions based on the candidate's resume and JD

skills.name: email_drafting
skills.description: Draft professional offer or rejection emails with warm, brand-positive tone

skills.name: email_sending
skills.description: Send real offer or rejection emails to candidates via Gmail SMTP

skills.name: candidate_database
skills.description: Save screened candidates to MongoDB and look up any candidate's application status

skills.name: pipeline_summary
skills.description: Get a full hiring pipeline overview grouped by role with Proceed/Hold/Reject breakdowns and top candidate highlights

skills.name: calendar_check
skills.description: Check today's or tomorrow's scheduled interviews from Google Calendar

skills.name: salary_benchmarking
skills.description: Benchmark a proposed salary against current market rates before making an offer

skills.name: policy_faq
skills.description: Answer HR policy questions that arise during recruitment: notice period, probation, offer terms, and conduct
